message:
feat(frankenterm-web): add patch_feed bridge from ftui-render to WebGPU (bd-lff4p.3.5)

Adds patch_feed module that converts ftui-render Buffer/BufferDiff into
CellPatch spans for the WebGPU renderer:

- cell_from_render: Cell → CellData (color/glyph/attr mapping)
- diff_to_patches: BufferDiff → Vec<CellPatch> with adjacent coalescing
- full_buffer_patch: full-buffer patch for first frame / resize

10 unit tests covering basic conversion, coalescing, cross-row spans.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
